status: PARTIAL - Ghidra bridge inaccessible; static-only deliverable

blocker.summary: All three Ghidra-bridge access paths were denied this session: (a) /tmp/ghidra_*.sh helper scripts via Bash, (b) direct mcp__ghidra__* MCP tools, (c) curl to 127.0.0.1:8089. objdump also blocked. Reading speed.exe as a binary file is blocked. No renames or comments could be applied.

vtbl_AIVehicleTraffic.evidence: docs/nfsplugin_sdk_mw05/Extensions.h:528-538 AIVehicleTrafficCast_t verifies the cast by checking *(uintptr_t*)ai == 0x891CF8 (the object's slot-0 vtable pointer). The same pattern verifiably resolves every other AIVehicle subclass cast.

class_layout.WRoadNav_lane_state: fLaneInd, fFromLaneInd, fToLaneInd, fLaneOffset, fFromLaneOffset, fToLaneOffset, fLaneChangeDist, fLaneChangeInc, bTrafficFilter, fOccludingTrailSpeed, NavCookie cookie-trail (32 deep)

per_frame_tick_function.confidence: vtable slot is provably the Update override (declared in AIVehicleTraffic.h), but the exact address inside the vtable cannot be read without Ghidra or binary access this session.

g_SkipFETrafficDensity.role: Density override active when SkipFE bootstrap path is used.

g_SkipFEDisableTraffic.role: Master traffic toggle in the debug skip-FE flow.

verified_static_findings.spawn_manager_struct: AISpawnManager has fields mMinSpawnDist (float) and mMaxSpawnDist (float) per AISpawnManager.h. These are the radius-gate consumers of MAX_TRAFFIC_SPAWN_DISTANCE.
